# The Mandrake

*[Machiavelli](../philosophers/machiavelli.md) · 1518 · *La Mandragola**

A five-act comedy, among the most famous of the Italian Renaissance stage: to seduce the virtuous Lucrezia, Callimaco spins a ruse that draws in a schemer, a compliant mother and a venal confessor. The same anthropology as the political works, but in full comic light: everyone is corruptible, and appearance governs.
